record_purpose: Phase 2 ten-field survival-psychology and conditional-gate applicability records

korath.visual_lane: peak-condition once-human male penitent, physical age 34
korath.core_wound: His public miracle failed at the exact moment everyone trusted him, leaving survivors alive only by transferring their wounds into his body.
korath.private_want: He wants someone to declare that his suffering made the failed miracle necessary and therefore forgivable.
korath.primary_fear: If others can survive without his pain, then his disgrace and continuing penance have no purpose.
korath.survival_strategy: He steals allies' wounds and makes himself indispensable through compulsory suffering.
korath.villainous_distortion: He converts protection into moral debt and demands obedience from everyone whose pain he carries.
korath.current_emotional_state: Exhausted shame sharpened into a low accusatory demand.
korath.emotional_contradiction: Compulsory service versus resentment that the protected can walk away.
korath.face_direction: Head stays bowed, but one exhausted eye fixes the viewer; mouth and jaw tighten as if swallowing accusation rather than merely grieving.
korath.pose_direction: The broken yoke crushes his shoulders while one low open hand demands that the viewer accept the debt; giant feet remain planted for interception.
korath.forbidden_read: No clean saint, heroic tank, radiant paladin, decorative demon, pretty sad angel, passive sorrowful giant, or generic rage monster.

veyra.core_wound: An early breach exposed its vulnerable center and taught it that anything not enclosed will be taken.
veyra.private_want: It wants a perfectly sealed world in which nothing it values can move beyond its walls.
veyra.primary_fear: An opening, independent motion, or uncontained ally will recreate the original breach.
veyra.survival_strategy: It seals each injury and uncertainty behind another nested layer.
veyra.villainous_distortion: Protection becomes possession; allies are treated as contents to be locked inside it.
veyra.current_emotional_state: Absolute possessive stillness while the larval core watches through the only permitted opening.
veyra.emotional_contradiction: Protective enclosure versus annihilation of the protected subject's freedom.
veyra.face_direction: There is no imposed face: the off-center plum slit and the bound larval core inside the crack are the only nonhuman attention mechanisms.
veyra.pose_direction: The blunt sealed egg stands on two short pillar legs while nested plates squeeze the central crack around the chosen contents.
veyra.forbidden_read: No humanoid head, expressive eyes, grin, cartoon mouth, harmless armadillo, robot, carried armor, cute creature, or generic stone golem.

cashmere.visual_lane: hot lean toned feminine peak-condition adult woman, age 30-32
cashmere.core_wound: The first paid kill erased a beloved person's face from her memory, and profit made the intimate loss feel orderly.
cashmere.private_want: She wants to own enough people, knowledge, and possible outcomes that nothing important can disappear beyond retrieval again.
cashmere.primary_fear: An unpriced uncertainty will expose that she no longer knows what she sacrificed, whom she loved, or why any acquisition matters.
cashmere.survival_strategy: Price, classify, contract, and own every danger before it can surprise or abandon her.
cashmere.villainous_distortion: She treats people as assets and spends their lives, choices, and memories as expendable capital.
cashmere.current_emotional_state: Pleasurable certainty while closing an acquisition she believes is already hers.
cashmere.emotional_contradiction: Inviting proprietary warmth over concealed panic about the blank memory she cannot price.
cashmere.face_direction: One eye sharply appraises the viewer while the other is fractionally unfocused; a tiny asymmetrical brow pinch and tight jaw betray fear beneath one inviting mouth corner.
cashmere.pose_direction: The ledger is clamped under one outer arm at hip height without hiding her torso while the opposite ink-dark hand reaches into the viewer's space with a precise contract-cast.
cashmere.forbidden_read: No generic aristocratic smirk, neutral beauty model, friendly merchant, angry executive, sad sorceress, older woman, or merely pretty occult accountant.

pilfer.visual_lane: mature adult wiry ratfolk fighter in peak condition
pilfer.core_wound: Every group that sheltered them assigned a profitable identity and punished any behavior that contradicted it.
pilfer.private_want: They want acceptance that does not require becoming a fixed, useful version of themselves.
pilfer.primary_fear: Someone will define them permanently, predict them, and make adaptation impossible.
pilfer.survival_strategy: They become whatever the room rewards before anyone can decide what they are.
pilfer.villainous_distortion: They steal identities, chemistry, and trust from others, leaving victims less coherent so Pilfer can remain unpinned.
pilfer.current_emotional_state: Ingratiating vigilance at the instant before opportunistic theft.
pilfer.emotional_contradiction: A quick plea to be liked versus active readiness to steal the viewer's valued trait.
pilfer.face_direction: One eye scans for reward while the exposed adult cheek, mouth, and jaw form an adaptive please-like-me smile over visible tension.
pilfer.pose_direction: The dash-loaded wedge bows deferentially while the long siphon hand has already crossed into the viewer's space.
pilfer.forbidden_read: No juvenile, cute rat, generic ninja, faceless scarf assassin, cackling thief, or harmless scavenger.

nyxa.visual_lane: elderly-appearing batlike temporal predator; horror and nonhuman anatomy read before age
nyxa.core_wound: Choosing one future forced every other possible life to die in her memory at once.
nyxa.private_want: She wants every possible future to remain available as ammunition so no choice can ever become final.
nyxa.primary_fear: A single irreversible timeline will trap her in one aging body and prove the unchosen lives are gone.
nyxa.survival_strategy: She hoards possible futures and fires them as parallel attacks.
nyxa.villainous_distortion: Other lives become expendable timelines she consumes to avoid accepting her own ending.
nyxa.current_emotional_state: Ecstatic predatory delight at making several deaths coexist.
nyxa.emotional_contradiction: Ancient grief over lost futures versus feral pleasure in spending them.
nyxa.face_direction: The asymmetric aged face narrows both eyes on the target; one mouth corner curls with delight while the other side is pulled tight by temporal pain.
nyxa.pose_direction: A clawed crouch compresses behind the spinal membrane bow, body split into incompatible ages along the firing axis.
nyxa.forbidden_read: No ordinary old woman, generic crone, glamorous vampire, fragile elder, decorative bat archer, or age-as-the-only-horror.

creep.core_wound: Its first attempt to join a group ended with every identifying mark used to isolate and reject it.
creep.private_want: It wants to approach others without ever being named, claimed, or rejected again.
creep.primary_fear: Recognition will let a group define a boundary and cast it outside once more.
creep.survival_strategy: It erases every trace that could support recognition, then removes witnesses.
creep.villainous_distortion: The wish to avoid rejection becomes procedural extermination of anyone capable of remembering it.
creep.current_emotional_state: Vacant fixation on the weakest witness.
creep.emotional_contradiction: Residual longing to approach versus absolute refusal to be known.
creep.face_direction: The smooth erased face and hollow eye apertures are the facial mechanism; no mouth appears, and the slight head cant fixes the weakest witness without human emotion.
creep.pose_direction: Low loaded limbs point toward the target while the broken blade-ring closes the only escape arc.
creep.forbidden_read: No cute alien, generic gray, neutral mannequin, decorative tentacle dancer, masked ninja, or merely sad outsider.

knoll.visual_lane: peak-condition adult male goblin combat support, equivalent age 31
knoll.core_wound: The first person he loved used affection to create an unpayable obligation and then collected it publicly.
knoll.private_want: He wants one relationship that cannot be converted into leverage, though he no longer believes such a thing exists.
knoll.primary_fear: Unpriced care will place him in someone else's debt and leave him unable to control the terms.
knoll.survival_strategy: He makes every relationship transactional before affection can become leverage.
knoll.villainous_distortion: He brands people into reciprocal obligations and destroys anyone who refuses the exchange.
knoll.current_emotional_state: Courteous welcome while deciding the exact pain of collection.
knoll.emotional_contradiction: A service smile versus clinical predatory measurement.
knoll.face_direction: A controlled smile addresses the viewer while one narrowed eye measures the branding site; paired eyelid scars compress depth focus and the jaw stays ready.
knoll.pose_direction: Compact athletic weight bears down behind one enlarged palm-length pear-handled stamp in visible contact with a long pale flexible receipt; one hand grips the isolated handle while the other supports the receipt outside the stamp silhouette.
knoll.forbidden_read: No elderly merchant, grandfather, cane user, harmless shopkeeper, child goblin, comic miser, accountant NPC, or generic assassin.

quillith.visual_lane: hot lean toned feminine peak-condition adult woman, age 30-33
quillith.core_wound: She sacrificed every private ambition to train a gifted pupil who surpassed her and then left without needing her.
quillith.private_want: She wants a pupil to choose permanent dependence and call that dependence love.
quillith.primary_fear: Being surpassed will prove her sacrifices purchased no authority and made her life unnecessary.
quillith.survival_strategy: She teaches partial truths, corrects intimacy, and withholds the final step so others must return.
quillith.villainous_distortion: Mentorship becomes engineered dependency; growth is punished whenever it threatens her ownership.
quillith.current_emotional_state: Intimate approval at the instant she imposes a corrective limit.
quillith.emotional_contradiction: Genuine care for potential versus terror-driven ownership of the pupil.
quillith.face_direction: Eyes pin the viewer as a favored pupil; one brow corrects precisely while the other tightens, lips offer quiet approval, and the jaw is rigid with fear of being surpassed.
quillith.pose_direction: A lean examiner stance suspends one tall correction slate from a visibly gripped short handle while the free hand reaches toward the viewer with intimate approval and directed obedience; inflamed nerves reveal the price.
quillith.forbidden_read: No elderly teacher, frail crone, disability-as-hook, kindly mentor, stern schoolmarm, generic witch, bodybuilder, or neutral attractive model.

kett.visual_lane: peak-condition adult male industrial brawler, physical age 35
kett.core_wound: A cartel made his labor, debt, and public humiliation indistinguishable until violence was the only action they acknowledged.
kett.private_want: He wants one impact powerful enough to restore the dignity he cannot ask for directly.
kett.primary_fear: A complex problem will expose him as helpless and return him to public humiliation.
kett.survival_strategy: He reduces every injury and insult to a sequence of three solvable blows.
kett.villainous_distortion: He makes other bodies absorb every humiliation he cannot name or negotiate.
kett.current_emotional_state: Controlled labor rage with anticipatory relief at the coming impact.
kett.emotional_contradiction: Rigid restraint versus desperate desire to feel simple physical release.
kett.face_direction: Eyes hold a grievance rather than generic anger; lips stay compressed, one cheek twitches toward relief, and the jaw aligns behind the loaded fist.
kett.pose_direction: The wage-stamp fist owns the forward mass while the smaller hand and trailing body remain deliberately subordinate.
kett.forbidden_read: No generic bruiser, cheerful worker, superhero fist, armored tank, mindless rage, or ornamental coin-and-chain gangster.

luna.visual_lane: hot lean toned feminine peak-condition adult woman, age 28-31
luna.core_wound: Two people she depended on formed a direct bond and excluded her the moment they no longer needed an intermediary.
luna.private_want: She wants every relationship to require her presence so exclusion becomes structurally impossible.
luna.primary_fear: The two sides will speak directly, compare what she told them, and discover they are safer without her.
luna.survival_strategy: She becomes the indispensable translator and controls which version of reality each side receives.
luna.villainous_distortion: She fractures perception, manufactures conflict, and offers herself as the only safe bridge through the conflict she created.
luna.current_emotional_state: Warm invitation split by cool surveillance of an unseen second party.
luna.emotional_contradiction: Performed intimacy versus terror of direct connection that excludes her.
luna.face_direction: One gaze pair follows the open inviting palm while the other pair tracks a second party; the mouth offers safety while lower-lid and throat tension expose fear of comparison.
luna.pose_direction: A wide split stance tensions exactly one physical diagonal refractor ligament from forward palm to opposite heel while the empty trailing hand controls a second social vector.
luna.forbidden_read: No neutral model, friendly mediator, generic seductress, rainbow crystal mage, black catsuit, ribbon dancer, gacha heroine, or harmless pretty woman.

malachor.core_wound: His body began an irreversible collapse, and the first stolen graft proved other people could pay to postpone it.
malachor.private_want: He wants continuous existence without ever feeling the terror or maintenance burden of his own failing body.
malachor.primary_fear: One unpaid moment will let the fortress disintegrate and reveal the panicked dependent organism inside.
malachor.survival_strategy: He incorporates debtor bodies and makes their tissue maintain his continuity.
malachor.villainous_distortion: Every nearby life becomes replacement material, structural support, and payment for his refusal to end.
malachor.current_emotional_state: Faceless circulatory hunger demanding immediate maintenance.
malachor.emotional_contradiction: Immovable fortress authority versus frantic certainty that collapse has already begun.
malachor.face_direction: There is no humanoid face: the exposed central heart contracts like an entitled alarm while auxiliary hearts and vascular tension reveal the maintenance panic.
malachor.pose_direction: Many claw supports carry the low circulatory vault as one enormous rib-cage clamp opens to pin the next tissue source; the central heart tightens visibly.
malachor.forbidden_read: No humanoid eyes or mouth, cartoon face, wood grain, tree-stump legs, dumb flesh golem, generic castle monster, sad trapped victim, vampire stereotype, or decorative body-horror pile.

sable.visual_lane: lean androgynous peak-condition adult human marksman, age 30-34
sable.core_wound: A real grievance was dismissed because they could not produce evidence in the form authority demanded.
sable.private_want: They want one undeniable proof that forces every witness to admit they were right.
sable.primary_fear: Contradictory evidence will reveal that certainty has replaced truth and erase the grievance sustaining them.
sable.survival_strategy: They turn every feeling into evidence and every person into a target that can confirm it.
sable.villainous_distortion: People are shot, cited, and reduced to proof until no independent account can survive.
sable.current_emotional_state: Cold moral satisfaction under a tightly suppressed flicker of doubt.
sable.emotional_contradiction: Unwavering evidentiary certainty versus fear that one contradiction will dissolve the self built around it.
sable.face_direction: The aiming eye fixes the target as proof; the scarred eye narrows against contradiction, lips compress with moral satisfaction, and one cheek holds denied doubt.
sable.pose_direction: The whole lean wedge converges along the extreme rifle line; ash witness-cloth and proof strips form a mobile field archive rather than a tactical uniform.
sable.forbidden_read: No generic scowl, ordinary soldier, black catsuit, sexy sniper stereotype, righteous hero, angry revenge eye, or librarian costume.
